category_sources: source_facts.description: Library for German banks; official SourceForge page categorizes it as Financial and describes bank account/bank code checking.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to API and build documentation at /html/index.html.
repo_sources: Official API/build documentation gives the Git clone URL https://git.code.sf.net/p/ktoblzcheck/code.
tags_sources: Official homepage says it checks account numbers and bank codes; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools including ktoblzcheck and ibanchk.
